summary: Weekly Admin Conversion Intelligence Email feature fully tested. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. All features working: Manual trigger (POST /api/admin/send-conversion-email), Preview (GET /api/admin/conversion-email/preview), topline metrics, funnel snapshot with leak point detection, revenue forecast, channel performance, RM leaderboard, risk alerts, email logging, and graceful skip behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_conversion_email_service.py correctly implements all 6 aggregation functions: topline metrics, funnel snapshot, revenue forecast, channel performance, RM leaderboard, risk alerts
Topline metrics include current and previous week comparison with trend indicators
Funnel snapshot correctly tracks all 7 pipeline stages and identifies leak points (biggest drop-off)
Revenue forecast correctly calculates weighted GMV using stage probability weights (New: 5%, Contacted: 10%, etc.)
Channel performance returns source/attribution data sorted by lead count
RM leaderboard returns top 5 RMs sorted by GMV with conversion metrics
Risk alerts correctly identify SLA breaches (>24h no contact), payment delays (>24h pending), and expiring holds (<12h)
Email log is created in admin_conversion_email_log collection with all metrics
Graceful skip behavior works when no meaningful data exists
Scheduled loop correctly configured for Monday 9 AM IST via asyncio background task
Admin-only access properly enforced (401 for unauth, 403 for RM)
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 100 leads, 8 confirmed bookings, 4 active RMs, 2 admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Admin Conversion Intelligence Email feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/send-conversion-email (manual trigger with manual=True flag), GET /api/admin/conversion-email/preview (returns all sections + HTML). Email service at backend/services/admin_conversion_email_service.py. Scheduled loop at server.py lines 1474-1491 runs Monday 9 AM IST. Email logs stored in admin_conversion_email_log collection. Response structure: {topline, funnel, forecast, channels, leaderboard, risks, html, generated_at, skipped}. Resend email sending is MOCKED (logged but not sent) due to missing API key.

POST /api/admin/send-conversion-email.returns: {sent, failed, recipients, metrics (gmv, bookings, alerts), generated_at, manual}
POST /api/admin/send-conversion-email.auth_required: admin role only (401 for unauth, 403 for RM)

GET /api/admin/conversion-email/preview.returns: {topline, funnel, forecast, channels, leaderboard, risks, html, generated_at, skipped}
GET /api/admin/conversion-email/preview.auth_required: admin role only (401 for unauth, 403 for RM)

fields: source, leads, confirmed, gmv, conversion per source
rm_name, leads, confirmed, gmv, conversion, avg_contact_hrs
16886 chars email HTML with all sections
log_id, sent_at, manual, sent_count, recipients, failed, metrics

graceful_skip.behavior: Returns {skipped: true, reason: 'No meaningful data'} when no leads/GMV/alerts

mocked_apis_list: Resend email API - emails logged but not sent due to missing API key (RESEND_API_KEY not configured)
